## Title Format

**Fix #<issue-number>: Brief description** (auto-closes Taskwarrior task on merge)

Examples:

- `Fix #123: Implement asset compression for build pipeline`
- `Fix #141: Add font subsetting to reduce bundle size`
- `Fix #147: Exclude unused Godot fonts from export`

## Description

[Brief overview of changes]

## Related Issue

Closes #<issue-number>

## Changes

- [ ] Change 1
- [ ] Change 2

## Testing

- [ ] Tests passing

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows "Fix #<issue>: description" format
- [ ] PR linked to issue
- [ ] Commit messages clear
- [ ] Tests added/updated
